projects.title: Incantation: Natural Language as the Action Interface for Multi-Entity Video World Models
projects.description: Incantation shows that per-frame, per-entity natural language is a stronger action interface than closed action IDs for multi-entity video world models, enabling cross-entity transfer, out-of-vocabulary action prompts, and parallel control.

projects.title: TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events
projects.description: TIE elevates time intervals to first-class primitives in DiT cross-attention. A principled, plug-and-play interval-aware extension of RoPE that unlocks concurrent and overlapping events in video generation.

projects.title: MAMBO-G: Magnitude-Aware Mitigation for Boosted Guidance
projects.description: ICML 2026 poster. MAMBO-G is a training-free, plug-and-play adaptive guidance schedule for fast text-to-image and text-to-video generation. It damps risky early guidance updates by measuring the update-to-prediction magnitude ratio.

projects.title: RAIN: Real-time Animation Of Infinite Video Stream
projects.description: A real-time animation system for infinite video streams, enabling low-latency virtual avatar animation from a single image on consumer-grade devices.

projects.title: The Matrix: Infinite-Horizon World Generation with Real-Time Moving Control
projects.description: A neural interactive simulation project for infinite-horizon world generation, real-time motion control, and AAA-game-scale visual environments.

projects.title: The Matrix Dataset
projects.description: Dataset documentation for Matrix world-model research, covering collection, processing, source games, controls, and release information.
